name: Grok 4.3 (High)
archDisplay: Mixture-of-Experts (size undisclosed); high reasoning-effort configuration of the same served weights as Grok 4.3
note: High reasoning-effort tier of Grok 4.3, same underlying weights as the default/low-effort configuration, opted into via the API's reasoning_effort parameter. This is the configuration Artificial Analysis benchmarks by default for Grok 4.3.

results.notes: GPQA Diamond, as measured/reported by Artificial Analysis; high reasoning-effort configuration. Evaluated at launch, 2026-04-30.
tau2-Bench Telecom, as measured by Artificial Analysis at launch, 2026-04-30 (also cited as 98% by other outlets).

verificationNotes: GPQA Diamond 90.1% corroborated across 3 independent write-ups summarizing Artificial Analysis's Grok 4.3 model page (TheAIRankings, Requesty, FelloAI). tau2-bench-telecom ~97.7-98% corroborated by both Artificial Analysis's own launch article and TheAIRankings. I deliberately dropped several numbers I could not corroborate: a composite 'AA Intelligence Index' figure that came back inconsistently across fetches (53.2, 53, 38, and 37.6 in different sources/pages — likely different sub-metrics or fetch-summarizer noise) is omitted since it has no matching benchmark slug in the valid enum anyway; a Humanity's Last Exam score of 35.0% appeared in only one source (TheAIRankings) and a follow-up targeted search could not corroborate it (only found Grok 4 / Grok 4 Heavy HLE numbers), so it is omitted per the 'omit rather than guess' rule.
